sections.title: Emergency Response Plan Drill and Acknowledgment Log
sections.html:
MISH 48 | Emergency Response Plan Drill and Acknowledgment Log

POLICY SUMMARY

This Emergency Response Plan Drill and Acknowledgment Log ensures that all employees are familiar with emergency procedures and their roles during an incident. Regular drills are conducted to maintain readiness and identify areas for improvement. Compliance with this plan is crucial for maintaining a safe work environment and adhering to regulatory requirements, including 29 CFR 1926.35 and WAC 296-155-140.

EMPLOYEE ACKNOWLEDGMENT

sections.title: Emergency Response Plan Drill and Acknowledgment Log (continued 2)
sections.html:
I acknowledge that I have read, understand, and agree to comply with the MH Construction Emergency Response Plan Policy as required by 29 CFR 1926.35 Employee Emergency Action Plans and WAC 296-155-140 Sanitation Emergency.
